El and Eh - kinetic energy measured
of fragments at the fission of U-235 by thermal
neutrons were used at the graduation of energy scale
When grossing to the masses of primary fragments
in value Mh was introduced the correction on emission
of prompt neutrons by fission fragments.It was supposed
that the dependence Nu(M) of average neutron-number
from the masses of fission fragments for fission
of Th-232 by neutrons with energy En=1.65 MeV
is similar Nu(M) for fission of U-233 by thermal
neutrons. The normalization of curve Nu(M) was produced
on the value Nu=2.08 - average neutron-number
for fission of Th-232 by neutrons with energy 1.6 MeV.
